_comment: Hand-curated KOH CDN art per spine scene + door. pick = chosen id, alts = runners-up shown in the verification gallery.

castle-balcony.why: Moonlit Garden Door — night, sea, moon: the vigil balcony mood

kingdome-garden.why: Garden Gate Crossing — radiant gate, companions crossing home; no baked-in text (the 'KoH doors' board and 'Garden Door' card have lettering)

cloverfield.why: Verdant Doors — green, alive, ordinary-day sacred

future-doors.why: Three Future Paths — the branching orchard, title exact

xp-door.why: Gage's XP Door — the glitched nostalgia door itself

sigil-city.why: City of Doors Yggdrasil Convergence — every door leads here

fog-door-return.why: The Threshold Mist — painterly fog threshold (The Fog Door image is a text lore-card)

castle-balcony/The Wishing Rail.why: Gothic Bridge Night — lantern-lit stone rail at night

castle-balcony/The Brass Spyglass.why: Tower of Signals — a new light far out

castle-balcony/The Knee-High Door.why: Elephant Oasis Door — Joy is already reaching for it

kingdome-garden/Ancient Doors.why: Library of Babylon — history/evolution/religion (Grotto Library was cut in the curation pass)

kingdome-garden/The Cloverfield.why: Verdant Doorway — the clover-green gate (The Green Door was cut)

kingdome-garden/Tomorrow Door.why: Three Glowing Doorways — the world that's coming (The Next Three Doors is a text spread)

kingdome-garden/The XP Door [GLITCHED].why: The Arcade Door — corrupted nostalgic liminal (Glitch Cat Room is a framed card)

kingdome-garden/Xenon Starship.why: Xenon Ring of Ships Twelve Point Mandala — all planets, midway, converge

kingdome-garden/Sigil, City of Doors.why: Sigil Back Doors — the meta-hub from its alleys

kingdome-garden/Fog Door Return.why: Rainy Threshold — the misty way back seen from the garden (Threshold Mist promoted to fog hero)

cloverfield/The Lucky Door.why: Three Doors — jeweled: shinies and lucky finds

cloverfield/The Today Door.why: Tavern Scene — the day you are actually in, alive (Garden Cafe Couple was cut)

cloverfield/The Tomorrow Door.why: Sunset Pilgrim — walking toward the world that's coming

future-doors/The Bright Branch.why: Golden Portal Door — a future where the gardens won

future-doors/The Unwritten Door.why: Doorway Sketch I — literally unfinished, the hinge waits

future-doors/The Recursive Door.why: Vortex Sketch — a hallway of itself, smaller each time (The Spiral reads as a network diagram)

xp-door/System Restore.why: Starlit Bedroom — the saved point, an old summer loading

xp-door/My Documents.why: Doors Storybook — every picture you ever saved (24 Canvas grid was cut)

xp-door/unknown.exe.why: Glitch Monster — publisher: unknown; you run it anyway

xenon-convergence/The Mirror Door.why: Valtoris Fein Three States Concept — as you were, are, might be

xenon-convergence/The Branch Door.why: Doors Triptych II — infinite versions, each leading somewhere true

xenon-convergence/The Merge Door.why: Mandala — all paths collapse into one point (Orrery Medallion was cut; this is the one mandala Alex kept)

sigil-city/The Gallery of Walked Doors.why: Gallery of Frames — your whole path hung in one hall

sigil-city/The Key Market.why: Treasure Keeper — stalls of keys not yet dreamed

sigil-city/The Lady's Gate.why: Queen of Diamonds — silent, watched, absolutely fair

fog-door-return/The Garden Gate.why: Wizard's Garden — the bright way straight home (Garden Gate Crossing promoted to garden hero)

fog-door-return/The Long Way Round.why: The Long March — arrive when you're ready, not before

fog-door-return/Lantern's Shortcut.why: Lantern Bearer — follow the steady flame
